reviews.comment:

Very safe, like all the ones we have here. We don't charge at any other station...

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio muy concurrida. Baños impecables. Deberían mejorar el servicio en confitería.

(Translated by Google)
Very busy gas station. Spotless restrooms. They should improve the service in the concession stand.

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Baños limpios. Buena atención. Posee un sector para despejarse y un sector con mesas y asientos para descansar al costado del local.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Clean restrooms. Good customer service. It has a relaxation area and a seating area with tables and chairs to rest on the side of the building.
